name: tex-packer-cli
description: AI-friendly texture atlas packer, splitter, and TinyPNG/Tinify (熊猫压缩) image compression CLI.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Pack images, folders, ZIPs, or .ftpp projects into atlas image plus metadata.

commands.name: compress
commands.description: Compress one or more images with TinyPNG/Tinify (熊猫压缩).

commands.name: split
commands.description: Split an atlas texture back into individual sprite images.

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspect images, metadata, project files, or ZIPs.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List exporters, splitters, filters, packers, options, or commands.

commands.name: skill install
commands.description: Install the bundled agent skill into Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, or a custom path.

commands.name: tinify set-key
commands.description: Save a TinyPNG/Tinify API key for future compress and pack --tinify runs.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Check runtime dependencies, package paths, and bundled assets.
